text:
The game did not click with me at first, didn't understand why people loved it so much. But after I beat the original (and liked it a lot), I decided to give the remake another try. Now I get why this franchise is so beloved, this games are engaging AF. Easily one of the best 40 hours I've spent in a while.

Although I believe that the original sill has its merits too, and deserves a chance as well. 100% Recommended.
label: personal_experience

text: I heard many things about the RE 3 remake and was always curious to see what I think for it myself.  I think that even though this game is good, it feels like a step back from RE 2 remake.  It is more action packed and a lot shorter than the previous game. This feels like a story DLC for 2 remake and it even reuses models and environments from it too.  Nemesis could have been done a lot better too, after what they did with Mr. X in the previous game I was excited to see what they could do with him here.  Nemesis is mostly scripted and when he does free roam to get the player, it is frustrating and the amount of trial and error is astonishing.  I recommend you get this game on sale, it feels rushed and hollow at the same time but if you are RE fan, get it.
label: opinion_judgment
